category_sources: Official twtxt docs describe CLI usage, configuration, feed format, and registry behavior.

display_name_sources: Official documentation heading and GitHub repository use the name twtxt.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs page is the dedicated twtxt documentation and says the source is maintained on GitHub.

repo_sources: Official twtxt Read the Docs page links to GitHub as the maintained source code repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from source_facts.homepage.
